ItacAcademyItem.Name: Occulti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of the Occulti Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Oratione del sig. Alberto Lollio gentil`huomo ferrarese academico occulto chiamato l`Arcano in biasimo dell`otio ai signori Academici occulti di Brescia (1567).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
